properties.entry: INSERT INTO TBL_MENU ( MENU_NAME , MENU_PRICE , CATEGORY_CODE , ORDERABLE_STATUS ) VALUES(?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE TBL_MENU SET MENU_NAME = ? , MENU_PRICE = ? WHERE MENU_CODE = ?
SELECT MENU_CODE , MENU_NAME FROM TBL_MENU WHERE MENU_CODE = ?
SELECT CATEGORY_CODE , CATEGORY_NAME , REF_CATEGORY_CODE FROM TBL_CATEGORY WHERE REF_CATEGORY_CODE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CATEGORY_CODE
